settings.heading: Advisory support for business decisions that need more than guesswork
settings.text: Use Advisory when you need a practical second view before spending money, changing systems, hiring support, or starting implementation.

settings.heading: Start with the decision in front of you
settings.text: Choose the route that gives you a decision brief, risk view, priority list or recommended next step.

settings.title: I need decision support
settings.text: Use a structured second opinion when the options, risks or next step are not yet clear.

settings.title: I need a business review
settings.text: Review workload, management rhythm, dependencies or risk before changing how the business operates.

settings.title: I need help choosing the right service
settings.text: Compare advisory, consulting, implementation and resource pathways before you buy or enquire.

settings.heading: Where a clear outside view helps
settings.text: Advisory is best when the business needs clarity before execution, not a large project team.

settings.title: Too many possible next steps
settings.text: You know action is needed, but sequence, priority and ownership are not settled.

settings.title: Budget or supplier risk
settings.text: A decision will cost money or time, so you need a practical check before committing.

settings.title: Owner workload is blocking progress
settings.text: The business needs a cleaner role, rhythm or decision process so work can keep moving.

settings.heading: Clear deliverables before you commit
settings.text: Advisory turns an open question into practical trade-offs, a priority view and a recommended proceed, pause, compare or escalate decision.

settings.title: Decision brief or next-step plan
settings.text: Turn a loose issue into options, priorities and a recommended next move.

settings.title: Business or operating review
settings.text: Check workload, management rhythm, dependencies or risk before building a larger plan.

settings.title: Move into consulting or implementation
settings.text: When the issue is bigger than advice, use advisory to define the scope before deeper support.

settings.heading: From business issue to decision brief
settings.text: Advisory keeps the process contained so you can act without turning every question into a large project.

settings.title: Choose the pathway
settings.text: Start with the decision, review or support type that best matches the business issue.

settings.title: Share the relevant context
settings.text: Provide the business background, current constraints, timeline and any known options.

settings.title: Receive practical guidance
settings.text: Get a clearer view of risks, trade-offs, priorities and sensible next steps.

settings.title: Move with confidence
settings.text: Use the advice to proceed, pause, compare options or request deeper support.

settings.heading: Decision support resources and next steps
settings.text: Use confirmed RBP services when you need practical advice, a structured review or a next-step decision before implementation.

settings.title: Owner Decision Support
settings.text: A structured advisory service for options, risks and next-step planning.

settings.title: Monthly Business Review Setup
settings.text: Set up a management review rhythm for decisions, actions and owner visibility.

settings.title: Management On-Demand Services
settings.text: Browse practical management services that connect advisory to follow-through.

settings.heading: Get a practical second view before you commit
settings.text: Start with decision support when the next move has commercial risk, budget impact or operational consequences.
